allow: Bash(pnpm --filter @piti/shared build 2>&1 && pnpm --filter @piti/agent build 2>&1 && pnpm test 2>&1)
Bash(pnpm --filter @piti/shared build 2>&1 && pnpm --filter @piti/gateway build 2>&1 && pnpm --filter @piti/agent build 2>&1)

Bash(git -C /Users/turinglabs/GIT/@turinglabs/piti commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Initial implementation of PITI - Personal AI Trainer

Autonomous personal trainer agent that connects via Telegram with per-user
Docker containers, long-term memory \(PostgreSQL + pgvector\), and multi-LLM
support \(Kimi, Claude, OpenRouter\).

Key features:
- pnpm monorepo \(shared, gateway, agent\)
- Per-user Docker container orchestration via Dockerode
- Conversation history and memory extraction persisted in PostgreSQL
- Topic enforcement guard \(heuristic + LLM classifier\)
- Auto language detection with per-user language setting
- Telegram user access control via env var
- 63 unit tests passing
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/turinglabs/GIT/@turinglabs/piti add packages/agent/src/agent/trainer.ts packages/agent/src/llm/provider.ts packages/shared/src/types/config.ts scripts/test-kimi.ts scripts/test-memory-extraction.ts scripts/test-memory-extraction2.ts scripts/test-memory-extraction3.ts && git -C /Users/turinglabs/GIT/@turinglabs/piti commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix Kimi API integration and memory extraction

- Add User-Agent: claude-code/0.1.0 header for Kimi Code Plan auth
- Fix base URL to api.kimi.com/coding/v1 with correct model names
- Fix memory extraction: Kimi puts structured output in reasoning_content
  instead of content, so use direct fetch to read both fields
- Add test scripts for Kimi API and memory extraction
EOF
\)")
